lectures.flashcardsDesc: Review key concepts with AI-generated flashcards
lectures.takeMcqDesc: Test your knowledge with a generated quiz
lectures.chatDesc: Ask questions about this lecture with AI

studybuddy.title: StudyBuddy
studybuddy.welcome: Hi! I'm StudyBuddy. I've read all your lecture slides and I'm ready to help. Ask me anything about the course!
studybuddy.placeholder: Ask anything about the lecture slides… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)
studybuddy.chatError: Sorry, something went wrong. Please check that the backend is running and your API key is set.
studybuddy.question: Question

flashcards.title: Flashcards
flashcards.failed: Failed to generate flashcards. Please try again.

mcq.title: MCQ Quiz
mcq.readyDesc: The AI will generate 10–15 multiple-choice questions covering all the key topics in this lecture.
mcq.failed: Failed to generate questions. Please try again.

learningMap.title: Learning Map
learningMap.generateDesc: AI will break this lecture into bite-sized study topics
learningMap.selectTopic: Select a topic from the map to study it
learningMap.failed: Failed to generate. Please try again.

scoreHistory.title: Score History
scoreHistory.noAttemptsDesc: Take an MCQ to start tracking your progress

assignments.title: Assignments
assignments.countClick: {{count}} assignment · Click one to get started
assignments.countClick_other: {{count}} assignments · Click one to get started
assignments.viewAssignmentDesc: Read the full assignment spec, deliverables, and rubric
assignments.assignmentChatDesc: Ask questions about requirements and concepts — task tracker included in the sidebar
assignments.placeholder: Ask about deliverables, rubric, concepts… (Enter to send)
assignments.wontSolve: Won't write code or solve the assignment directly.
assignments.chatError: Sorry, something went wrong. Please check that the backend is running.
assignments.welcome:
Hi! I'm AssignmentHelper. I've read this assignment and I'm here to help you understand the requirements, clarify the rubric, and talk through concepts.

**Note:** I won't write code or solve the assignment for you — that's your job. But I'll help you get there.

fileViewer.videoUnsupported: Your browser does not support video playback.
